records.m_Talk_ENG: Whew...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whew...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whew...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That was amazing...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That was amazing...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That was amazing...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sasha, right? Check the radar for me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sasha, right? Check the radar for me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sasha, right? Check the radar for me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, okay!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, okay!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, okay!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's silent. The signal's completely gone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's silent. The signal's completely gone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's silent. The signal's completely gone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We have to hurry since the C.O.s can appear out of nowhere at any time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We have to hurry since the C.O.s can appear out of nowhere at any time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We have to hurry since the C.O.s can appear out of nowhere at any time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't you going to run away?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't you going to run away?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't you going to run away?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You tried to save me by risking your life, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You tried to save me by risking your life, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You tried to save me by risking your life, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm just repaying the favor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm just repaying the favor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm just repaying the favor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay... Thanks for saving me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay... Thanks for saving me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay... Thanks for saving me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No...! My cart's all banged up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No...! My cart's all banged up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No...! My cart's all banged up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It'll take some time to fix it. Guess I'm going back empty-handed today...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It'll take some time to fix it. Guess I'm going back empty-handed today...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It'll take some time to fix it. Guess I'm going back empty-handed today...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you really need all this junk?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you really need all this junk?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you really need all this junk?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I do. I turn them into useful items and sell them for money.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I do. I turn them into useful items and sell them for money.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I do. I turn them into useful items and sell them for money.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Guess your village is pretty poor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Guess your village is pretty poor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Guess your village is pretty poor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that's not what I meant!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that's not what I meant!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that's not what I meant!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The village helped me a lot and I'm just giving back what I can.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The village helped me a lot and I'm just giving back what I can.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The village helped me a lot and I'm just giving back what I can.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Actually, I always collected the junk with the militia, but I came out alone today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Actually, I always collected the junk with the militia, but I came out alone today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Actually, I always collected the junk with the militia, but I came out alone today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehehe... I really thought that I could take on a C.O. now. Guess I was wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehehe... I really thought that I could take on a C.O. now. Guess I was wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehehe... I really thought that I could take on a C.O. now. Guess I was wrong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How long will it take to fix that cart?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How long will it take to fix that cart?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How long will it take to fix that cart?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? About thirty minutes or so?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? About thirty minutes or so?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? About thirty minutes or so?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Give me the radar. I'll stand guard while you fix it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Give me the radar. I'll stand guard while you fix it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Give me the radar. I'll stand guard while you fix it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you're really going to help me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you're really going to help me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you're really going to help me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I knew I had a good eye for people!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I knew I had a good eye for people!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I knew I had a good eye for people!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You complain a bit, but you're a good person!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You complain a bit, but you're a good person!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You complain a bit, but you're a good person!

records.m_Talk_ENG: All done! I even fixed the junk while I was at it. Now, I can load Mavka on the cart!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All done! I even fixed the junk while I was at it. Now, I can load Mavka on the cart!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All done! I even fixed the junk while I was at it. Now, I can load Mavka on the cart!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Can't believe I stopped moving again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Can't believe I stopped moving again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Can't believe I stopped moving again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. I fixed the cart thanks to you, and I get to keep all the junk.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. I fixed the cart thanks to you, and I get to keep all the junk.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. I fixed the cart thanks to you, and I get to keep all the junk.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shall we get going? Hup!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shall we get going? Hup!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shall we get going? Hup!
